updates.summary: Version log system, update history UI, and deploy automation script.
updates.description: Update checks now use versions.json, Settings shows update details/history, and deployment can be automated with deploy.py.
changes: Added update log history in Settings
Added new update details panel in Settings

updates.summary: Manual update checks and offline stability improvements.
updates.description: Service worker update checks were improved and caching behavior was hardened to avoid stale update detection.
